allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); try { JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('data/materials.json','utf-8'\)\); console.log\('valid'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./data/materials.json'\); console.log\('素材数:', data.materials.length\); const withLinks = data.materials.filter\(m => m.links && m.links.length\); console.log\('含链接素材:', withLinks.length\); withLinks.forEach\(m => console.log\('  ', m.title, '->', m.links.length, '个链接'\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/materials.json'\); console.log\('categories:', d.categories.length\); console.log\('materials:', d.materials.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const {execSync}=require\('child_process'\); try{execSync\('for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %a in \(\\'netstat -aon ^| find :3001 ^| find LISTENING\\'\) do taskkill /F /PID %a',{shell:'cmd.exe'}\)}catch\(e\){}")
Bash(node -pe "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\)\); '素材:' + d.totalMaterials + ' 分类:' + d.totalCategories" kill %1)

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const cats = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\).toString\(\)\); cats.pop\(\); process.stdout.write\(JSON.stringify\(cats\)\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const cats = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\).toString\(\)\); console.log\('Total categories:', cats.length\); // Remove the last category cats.pop\(\); process.stdout.write\(JSON.stringify\(cats\)\); }\); ")
Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./db'\); const count = db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM materials'\).get\(\); console.log\('materials count:', count.c\);")
Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/gaokao.db'\); console.log\(db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM types'\).all\(\)\);")
Bash(findstr /I "clash v2ray shadowsocks trojan sing-box mihomo")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mats=d.get\('materials',[]\); print\(f'Materials count: {len\(mats\)}'\); [print\(f'  {m[\\"title\\"]}: has content={\\"content\\" in m}, excerpt={\\"excerpt\\" in m}, len={len\(m.get\(\\"content\\",\\"\\"\)\)}'\) for m in mats[:3]]")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM materials;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM materials WHERE status='approved';")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT status, COUNT\(*\) as c FROM materials GROUP BY status;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT DISTINCT tag FROM material_tags LIMIT 30;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT DISTINCT topic FROM material_topics LIMIT 30;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT tag\) as tag_count FROM material_tags;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT topic\) as topic_count FROM material_topics;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as link_count FROM material_links;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT title, content, type_id, created_at FROM materials WHERE category_id = 'tech' AND status = 'approved' ORDER BY created_at")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT title, length\(content\), type_id, created_at FROM materials WHERE category_id = 'tech' AND status = 'approved' ORDER BY created_at")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT id, title, content, type_id, subcategory_id, created_at FROM materials WHERE category_id = 'tech' AND status = 'approved' ORDER BY created_at")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT * FROM subcategories WHERE category_id = 'tech'")
Bash(sqlite3 data/gaokao.db "SELECT title, length\(content\), type_id, created_at FROM materials WHERE status = 'approved' AND category_id != 'tech' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 20")
